subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá, O Khunṣárí, O steward of the feast! Praise be unto God that in those regions thou hast partaken of the heavenly repast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء ای خونساری ای خوانسالار الحمد لله در آن صفحات خوانی از مائده سماایه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @methods of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
